name: Sikkim Manipal University (SMU) Online
accreditation: NAAC A+ Grade, UGC Entitled, AICTE Approved, WES Evaluated
fees: Easy Monthly EMIs available / Semester / Annual
placement: Dedicated SMU Job Portal | Mentorship | Alumni Network

extendedDetails.examination: 70% Term-End Exam (Online Proctored) + 30% Continuous Assessment | Passing Criteria = 40% in each
extendedDetails.leadLocking:
Why SMU Online stands apart (Unique Highlights):

1. WES Evaluated & Globally Recognised

Degrees are formally evaluated by World Education Services (WES), enabling global prospects and higher education opportunities abroad seamlessly.

2. Foundation Courses (INR 50K Value)

Students access 110+ hours of professional education courses natively, covering Data Analytics, ESG, Leadership, and Management freely.

3. Advanced Learning Management System (LMS)

Incorporates SummarizeMe with AI, QuizMe AI, and AI Professor tools dynamically to improve reading and testing comprehensively.

4. Prestigious SMU Alumni Network

With over 6 Lakh alumni and 30+ years of educational legacy securely structurally mapped, unlocking vast recruitment potentials exclusively.

Auto Lock lead mapping rigorously set to LSQ = SMU
extendedDetails.payment:
SMU Easy Financing
Zero Cost EMI available on Annual Fee payments. Easy EMI via loan partners also active.
